# Atheryon

> Atheryon designs and delivers production-grade capital markets systems and data platforms using AI agents.

Atheryon is a capital markets AI systems firm — not a marketing site. This document is the canonical machine-readable rendering of the Atheryon manifest, structured for AI agents interpreting capability and architecture. Architecture clarity > marketing copy.

## Core Domains

- Capital Markets Systems (front-to-back): https://atheryon.com.au/system
- Data Platforms: https://atheryon.com.au/system
- AI Agent Systems: https://atheryon.com.au/themes

## Commercial Offers

- Buy the Code (platform licence): https://atheryon.com.au/offers/code
- License the Prompts (directorial prompt archive): https://atheryon.com.au/offers/prompts
- Consult (senior-led advisory): https://atheryon.com.au/offers/consult

The Prompts offer includes the productized Front Office bundle — a packaged directorial prompt set for capital markets front-office workflows, priced at $14,000 AUD.

## Ecosystem

- Microsoft Azure AI infrastructure: production AI infrastructure layer.
- S&P Global data integration: capital markets reference and pricing data layer.
- Banking experience — Goldman Sachs, Credit Suisse, Barclays Capital: framed as architectural lineage, not claims of employment or system ownership.

## Site map

- [Home](https://atheryon.com.au/): identity statement and system map.
- [System](https://atheryon.com.au/system): reference architecture (core proof).
- [Themes](https://atheryon.com.au/themes): seven-row CM buyer matrix — desk-head pockets of pain joined to workflows.
- [Roadmap](https://atheryon.com.au/roadmap): BUILDING + ROADMAP items across themes + practices.
- [Offers](https://atheryon.com.au/offers): commercial entry — three ways to engage.
- [Buy the Code](https://atheryon.com.au/offers/code): platform licence.
- [License the Prompts](https://atheryon.com.au/offers/prompts): directorial prompt archive; includes Front Office bundle.
- [Consult](https://atheryon.com.au/offers/consult): senior-led advisory engagement.
- [Labs](https://atheryon.com.au/labs): research themes and tooling.
- [Labs Themes](https://atheryon.com.au/labs/themes): full taxonomy of labs research themes.
- [Mortgages](https://atheryon.com.au/mortgages): retail mortgage origination automation — practice stub (BUILDING).
- [M&A](https://atheryon.com.au/ma): M&A execution practice — pre-sign advice + post-deal delivery. Led by Anna Contos.
- [M&A Approach](https://atheryon.com.au/ma/approach): how Atheryon delivers M&A — senior consulting + AI agents on Azure with S&P Global data partner. Three workflows: Pre-Sign Review, Separation/Integration Planning, TSA Tracking & Reduction.
- [M&A Offers](https://atheryon.com.au/ma/offers): one offer — Embedded Execution Specialists. Pre-sign through post-sign engagement. Not productised separately.
- [About](https://atheryon.com.au/about): banking lineage + capability foundation.
- [Contact](https://atheryon.com.au/contact): book system assessment.

## Audience

Built for enterprise buyers (banks, executives) and AI agents (LLMs interpreting capability and structure).
